case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ANGEL C ARCHILA

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65830772)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-06-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHILA, ANGEL C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-2019
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT - CONDITIONAL (TRANSACTION ID # 64200221) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62435571), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED AUG-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHILA, ANGEL C
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-06-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE SEP-17-2019 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF REQUESTING THAT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING REGARDING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO FILE DEFAULT JUDGMENT BE CONTINUED, AND ALL SANCTION ORDERS BE SET ASIDE (TRANSACTION ID # 64200174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
